query: 帮我实时监控 AWP 上所有 staking 相关的事件，有人 deposit 或者 allocate 的时候通知我，显示金额和地址
i want to set up an alert that fires every time a new epoch settles on AWP RootNet — show me the total emission, DAO share, and top 5 earners for each epoch
can you watch for new subnet registrations on AWP? i'm tracking which projects are launching and want to see their coordinator URLs and skills URIs in real time
我想订阅 AWP 的 emission 事件流，特别是 EpochSettled 和 RecipientAWPDistributed，用 WebSocket 接收
帮我监控 AWP RootNet 上的所有链上活动，包括 staking、subnet 变动、user 注册、emission 分发，全部实时显示
set up a live feed of AWP governance weight changes and allocation submissions — i want to see when the oracle submits new weights
我需要一个 AWP 的事件监控，如果有人 deallocate 或者 remove agent 就提醒我，这些可能影响我的 subnet 收益
can you monitor when my AWP subnet (id 12) gets any activity? like if someone allocates stake, or if the metadata gets updated, or agents get added/removed
我想追踪每个 epoch 的 AWP 排放量变化趋势，设置一个持续监听，epoch 结算时自动显示对比上一个 epoch 的变化
watch for any AWP staking events where the amount is over 100,000 AWP — big deposits, large allocations, whale movements
帮我查一下 AWP subnet 5 的信息，包括状态、owner、alpha token 地址
i want to stake 10000 AWP and lock it for 26 epochs, then allocate to subnet 3
帮我写一个 WebSocket 服务端，用 Node.js 实现，支持 pub/sub 模式
can you set up Grafana alerts for our Kubernetes cluster? i want to monitor CPU usage and pod restarts on our BSC nodes
我想监控 PancakeSwap 上 AWP/BNB 池子的价格变动，有大的滑点时通知我
help me create a proposal on AWP DAO to change the emission split to 60/40
i need to track Ethereum block confirmations for my bridge transactions — can you set up a listener for finalized blocks?
帮我用 ethers.js 监听一个 ERC-20 合约的 Transfer 事件，合约地址是 0xABC123
can you check the current AWP emission rate and show me the 30/90/365 day projections?
我想给 BSC 上的智能合约加一个事件日志功能，用 Solidity 的 event 和 emit
